rules: imagery should have high appetite appeal
silo images should be photographed consistently according to packaging or product type
minimize reflections on plastic, foil, and shiny packaging, especially when covering important product information
remove unnecessary stickers not part of package design, such as special promotion stickers or legal declarations
packaging and labels should be presented straight, not angled or crooked
photograph each unique and meaningful side of the product package
for round or irregular shapes, present sides so printed information and graphics are centered and legible
front view is the side with predominant brand and labeling, format, variant, and size/quantity
products should be evenly lit from side to side and top to bottom
exposure and color should correctly represent the item
maintain separation between product and background
clip products onto pure white background, RGB 255/255/255
retouch dirt, dust, fingerprints, damage, blemishes, expiration dates, lot numbers, and sample-only information
lifestyle images should be realistic, professionally lit, and styled appropriately to the item and brand
product being sold should remain the hero of the lifestyle image
packaging should be incorporated into lifestyle images when practical to connect lifestyle images to silo shots
items must display all indicated required images and conditionally required images and meet the minimum image count listed on each page

main_image.label: Main Image
main_image.description: Primary carousel image/hero image for the PDP.

lifestyle_in_use.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use.guidance: Show the product in a realistic in-use or in-room setting that reflects how it is used.
lifestyle_in_use.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the furniture in a realistic room or in-use setting.

lifestyle_in_use_mattress.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use_mattress.guidance: Show the product on a bed to communicate scale, loft, drape, or coverage.
lifestyle_in_use_mattress.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the sleep product on a bed to communicate scale, loft, drape, or coverage.

lifestyle_alternate.label: Lifestyle, Alternate
lifestyle_alternate.guidance: Show the product in a different realistic setting to demonstrate an alternate use or context.
lifestyle_alternate.recommendation: Add an alternate lifestyle image showing the product in a different use case or room context.

silo_front.label: Silo, Front
silo_front.guidance: Show the product isolated on a white background in a straight-on hero view.
silo_front.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image on pure white.

silo_front_profile.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_profile.guidance: Show the product on white in the angle that best communicates profile, thickness, or shape.
silo_front_profile.recommendation: Add a silo image on white showing the angle that best communicates profile, thickness, or shape.

silo_angle.label: Silo Angle
silo_angle.guidance: Show the product on white background in the angle that best communicates profile, thickness, or shape.
silo_angle.recommendation: Add an angled silo image on white that clearly communicates profile, thickness, or shape.

silo_front_in_pack.label: Silo, Front, In Pack
silo_front_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on packaging image showing the customer-facing packaging clearly.

silo_out_of_pack_whats_included.label: Silo, Out of Pack, What's Included
silo_out_of_pack_whats_included.guidance: Show all kit components in a clean flat-lay on a white background with every item visible.
silo_out_of_pack_whats_included.recommendation: Add a what's-included flat-lay showing all kit or set components clearly on white.

silo_single.label: Silo, Single
silo_single.guidance: Show a single unit from a multipack straight-on on a white background with the label fully legible.
silo_single.recommendation: Add a single-unit silo image from the set or multipack on white.

silo_alternate.label: Silo, Alternate
silo_alternate.recommendation: Add an alternate-angle silo image to show another side or view of the product.

silo_back.label: Silo, Back
silo_back.guidance: Show the back of product on a pure white background.
silo_back.recommendation: Add a back-of-product silo image on pure white.

silo_detail.label: Silo, Detail
silo_detail.guidance: Show a close detail of material, weave, fill, cover, or surface finish.
silo_detail.recommendation: Add a detail image showing material, weave, fill, cover, construction, or surface finish.

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.guidance: Show key size, height, scale, install clearance, layout guidance, or product dimensions clearly and consistently.
dimensions.recommendation: Add a dimensions graphic showing size, height, scale, fit, or install clearance clearly.

feature_graphic.label: Feature Graphic
feature_graphic.guidance: Highlight key features, layers, firmness, protection, capacity, care, performance story, or other product claims using clean graphics.
feature_graphic.recommendation: Add a clean feature graphic highlighting key features, layers, firmness, capacity, care, protection, or performance claims.

additional_recommendations: Conditional Required Images: Show boxed or layered construction, and display compatibility or alternate lifestyle images when relevant.
Deviation Notes: Profile silo is acceptable where thickness and profile shape are key.
notes: Silo Front should show the product on white in the angle that best communicates profile, thickness, or shape.
Silo Angle should also show the product on white in the angle that best communicates profile, thickness, or shape.
Detail should show material, weave, fill, cover, or surface finish.
Feature Graphic should highlight layers, firmness, protection, or other performance claims.
Product photography should follow a consistent visual approach to ensure cohesion across the assortment.
Consistency in angle is critical to maintain a unified PDP and shelf presentation.
Individual brand guidelines should take precedence.
Furniture imagery should clearly communicate scale, fit, finish, configuration, and how the product is used in-room.

additional_recommendations: Conditional Required Images: Display configuration using a layout graphic, show assembly steps when applicable, and display finish swatches when variations exist.
Optional Recommendations: Close-up joinery; finish options.
Deviation Notes: Slot 4 should usually explain piece breakdown or layout, not just a generic benefit.
notes: Lifestyle should show the product in a realistic in-use or in-room setting.
Dimensions should show overall dimensions plus install clearance or layout guidance needed to understand fit.
Silo Out of Pack, What's Included should show all kit components in a clean flat-lay on white with every item visible.
Silo Single should show a single unit from a multipack straight-on on white.
Silo Alternate should capture an alternate angle of the product.
Feature Graphic should highlight key features using graphics and lifestyle or silo imagery.
Product photography should follow a consistent visual approach to ensure cohesion across the assortment.
Consistency in angle is critical to maintain a unified PDP and shelf presentation.
Individual brand guidelines should take precedence.
Furniture imagery should clearly communicate scale, fit, finish, configuration, and how the product is used in-room.

additional_recommendations: Conditional Required Images: Show an open view to highlight interior storage or access, display finish swatches when applicable, show assembly graphics when needed, and show packaging when distinct.
Deviation Notes: Furniture usually still needs a fifth silhouette or detail image even after the core four.
notes: Lifestyle In-Use should show the product in a realistic in-use or in-room setting.
Lifestyle Alternate should show the product in a different realistic setting to demonstrate alternate use or context.
Silo Detail should show material, weave, fill, cover, or surface finish.
Silo Front should show the product isolated on white in a straight-on hero view.
Feature Graphic should highlight the primary feature, capacity, care, or performance story.
Silo Back should show the back of product on pure white.
Dimensions should show product dimensions clearly and consistently.
Product photography should follow a consistent visual approach to ensure cohesion across the assortment.
Consistency in angle is critical to maintain a unified PDP and shelf presentation.
Individual brand guidelines should take precedence.
Furniture imagery should clearly communicate scale, fit, finish, configuration, and how the product is used in-room.
